ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., city, country) */,
  "department_budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "department_headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of education */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of education */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role belongs to */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job role */,
  "role Responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the job role */,
  "role_requirements" TEXT /* Qualifications and skills required for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the performance rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to determine the performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "base_salary" INTEGER /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus received */,
  "stock_options" INTEGER /* Stock options granted */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., performance, retention, sign-on) */,
  "benefits_package" TEXT /* Description of the benefits package (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session (in hours) */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Organization or individual providing the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_history" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "previous_role" TEXT /* Previous job role */,
  "new_role" TEXT /* New job role */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of promotion */,
  "promotion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the promotion (e.g., performance, reorganization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "attrition_rate" REAL /* Attrition rate within the department */,
  "job_satisfaction_index" REAL /* Index of job satisfaction within the department */,
  "work_life_balance_index" REAL /* Index of work-life balance within the department */,
  "employee_turnover" REAL /* Rate of employee turnover within the department */,
  "employee_retention_rate" REAL /* Rate of employee retention within the department */,
  "diversity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the level of diversity within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_analysis_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., job satisfaction, work-life balance) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the employee */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the employee for the feedback (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., work environment, management, benefits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager oversees */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date as manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "manager_direct_reports" INTEGER /* Number of direct reports under the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance rating */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person conducting the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person conducting the review */,
  "reviewer_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the reviewer to the employee (e.g., manager, peer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_reviews_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES performance_ratings ("rating_id")
)
